name: agent-lint
description: Meta-agent orchestrator for AI coding agent context artifacts (AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, skills, rules, workflows, plans). Provides guidelines, action plans, and maintenance rules — the client LLM does all file editing.

tools.name: agentlint_get_guidelines
tools.description: Returns comprehensive Markdown guidelines for creating or updating a context artifact type (agents, skills, rules, workflows, plans)

tools.name: agentlint_plan_workspace_autofix
tools.description: Scans workspace for all context artifact files, identifies gaps, and returns a step-by-step fix plan

tools.name: agentlint_quick_check
tools.description: Checks whether recent code changes require updates to context artifacts

tools.name: agentlint_emit_maintenance_snippet
tools.description: Returns a persistent rule snippet for IDE clients to enable automatic context maintenance

resources.name: agentlint-guidelines
resources.description: Comprehensive guidelines for creating or updating AI agent context artifacts

resources.name: agentlint-template
resources.description: Skeleton template for creating new context artifacts

resources.name: agentlint-path-hints
resources.description: File path patterns and discovery hints for finding artifacts across IDE clients
